scripts.test: npm run prepare:codegen && vitest run --coverage && playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=webkit && npm run build:only && node scripts/bundle-budget.mjs && node scripts/perf-check.mjs 2>&1 | bash scripts/filter-lighthouse.sh
scripts.test:quick: npm run prepare:codegen && vitest run && playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox-smoke --project=webkit-smoke
scripts.verify: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run validate:csp-theme-script-hash && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json && prettier --check . && eslint . --max-warnings=0 && vitest run --reporter=dot
scripts.test:unit:smoke: npm run prepare:codegen && vitest run tests/unit/hooks.server.localeDetection.test.ts tests/unit/quizQuerySchema.test.ts tests/unit/urlParamsHelper.test.ts tests/unit/quizPathHelper.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:a11y: npm run prepare:codegen && playwright test tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.ts
scripts.test:perf: npm run build && npm run test:perf:desktop && npm run test:perf:mobile
scripts.test:perf:desktop: LIGHTHOUSE_PRESET=desktop LIGHTHOUSE_RUNS=3 node scripts/perf-check.mjs 2>&1 | bash scripts/filter-lighthouse.sh
scripts.test:perf:mobile: LIGHTHOUSE_PRESET=mobile LIGHTHOUSE_RUNS=3 node scripts/perf-check.mjs 2>&1 | bash scripts/filter-lighthouse.sh
scripts.deploy:check: npm run prepare:codegen && vitest run --coverage && npm run build:only
scripts.check: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run validate:csp-theme-script-hash && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run lint:format && npm run lint:eslint
